name: autoconference
description: Multi-agent research conference — orchestrates parallel AI researchers, adversarial debate, and automated synthesis for any research topic.

skills.name: autoconference
skills.description: Core conference loop with parallel researchers and chairman synthesis.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: 8-step interactive setup wizard for configuring a conference session.

skills.name: resume

skills.name: survey
skills.description: Literature survey mode: systematic review, clustering, and comparison tables.

skills.name: ship
